description: Official Ottoman-era accounts concerning the produce of the city of Lajjūn (qāʾima mubāraka in shāʾ allāh taʿālā bi-muqāsamat al-ghilāl al-mawjūda bi-madīnat al-Lajjūn al-makhdūma(?) al-dīwān al-saʿīd al-ʿālī al-mawlawī al-sayyidī al-mālikī al-maḥrūs...." There follows the name of a notable: جاني(؟) بك. On Lajjūn, see Marom, Tepper, and Adams, "Lajjun: forgotten provincial capital in Ottoman Palestine," Levant (2023); https://doi.org/10.1080/00758914.2023.2202484. ASE
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
